treatment_information.dosage_or_details: left internal mammary artery to left anterior descending artery, reverse saphenous vein graft to posterior descending artery, ramus intermedius artery, and obtuse marginal artery
treatment_information.treatment_response: Normal biventricular function, no other new findings.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted after lightheadedness and passing out.
Cardiac catheterization performed showing multivessel coronary artery disease.
Coronary artery bypass grafting x4 surgery performed.
Post-surgery evaluation showed normal biventricular function.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up appointment will discuss driving limitations.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient ambulating, gait steady, sternal pain managed with oral analgesics.
